title: rubus phyllophorus
intro: Rubus phyllophorus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayas and parts of China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its ability to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus phyllophorus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Rubus phyllophorus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or jam, making it accessible for various herbal remedies.
